name: My Coverage
description: View all PolicyNFT tokens held by the connected wallet, filtered by status

screens.name: My Coverage
screens.description: Connected wallet's PolicyNFT tokens listed as cards or table. Shows pool name, status badge (ACTIVE/SETTLED/EXPIRED/CANCELLED), premium paid, coverage amount, expiry date, and payout amount if settled. Filter tabs for status. Unauthenticated state shows wallet connect prompt.

sections.title: My Coverage
sections.subtitle: Your active and historical insurance policies

sections.emptyMessage: No policies found. Browse pools to acquire coverage.

states.name: Not Connected
states.description: Wallet not connected — prompt to connect

elementDescriptions.Connect Prompt: Card with 'Connect wallet to view your coverage' + connect button

states.name: Loading Policies
states.description: Fetching PolicyNFT tokens for connected wallet

elementDescriptions.Policy List: Skeleton rows while fetching token IDs and policy data

states.name: Policies Loaded
states.description: All policies visible with live on-chain status

elementDescriptions.Policy Cards: ACTIVE = green badge, SETTLED = teal badge with payout amount, EXPIRED = grey badge, CANCELLED = red badge
elementDescriptions.Filter Tabs: Counts update to reflect actual status distribution

appFlows.name: Load policies for connected wallet
appFlows.trigger: User navigates to /coverage with wallet connected

steps.description: usePoliciesByHolder(address) calls PolicyNFT.tokensOfOwner(address) — returns uint256[] of token IDs
usePolicyData(tokenId) calls PolicyNFT.getPolicyData(tokenId) — returns OnChainPolicy struct with status, premium, coverage, expiry, payoutAmount
usePoolName(policy.pool) reads InsurancePool.name via getPoolData() — renders pool name on each card
Policy cards rendered with status badge, premium, coverage, expiry date. SETTLED policies also show payoutAmount.

appFlows.outcome: User sees all their insurance policies with live on-chain status
